backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining data types (Product, Order, CustomOrderRequest, ReturnRequest, NewsletterSubscriber) and CRUD endpoints for a knotankey e-commerce backend, with admin passcode-gated operations for products and orders.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting two implemented features: a 'Secure Payment Process' notice box on CheckoutPage and a payment instructions message block on ThankYouPage, both with high confidence.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON map of frontend source file summaries describing each component/page's purpose and notable changes, such as INR currency formatting, UI updates, and admin panel features.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry file defining CSS custom properties for light and dark theme design tokens (colors, radius, chart colors, sidebar) used throughout the app.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the React app, setting the page title to 'knotankey' and loading the Nunito 700 font from Google Fonts.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that sets up TanStack Router with all app routes, wraps the layout in CartProvider, and shows a LoadingScreen for 2.2 seconds on initial load.
frontend/src/components/admin/AdminCusto: Admin component that fetches and displays custom order requests in a responsive grid, showing details like product type, color, size, budget, email, description, and an optional inspiration image.
frontend/src/components/admin/AdminOrder: Admin component that lists all orders with customer info, item details, and totals, and allows updating each order's status via a dropdown select.
frontend/src/components/admin/AdminProdu: Admin component for full product CRUD, including a reusable ProductForm with image upload/preview, fields for title, category, price, description, and bestseller toggle.
frontend/src/components/admin/AdminRetur: Admin component that fetches and displays return requests in a list, showing order ID, email, reason, description, and submission date.
Slide-in cart drawer component that lists cart items, shows the total, and provides buttons to proceed to checkout or view the full cart page.
frontend/src/components/cart/CartItem.ts: Individual cart item row displaying product image, title, unit price, a quantity selector, line total, and a remove button.
frontend/src/components/checkout/OrderSu: Read-only checkout sidebar that lists cart items with thumbnails and quantities, then shows subtotal, free shipping, and the final total.
frontend/src/components/home/AboutSectio: Renders an 'Our Story' section with a parallax background image, dark gradient overlay, and fade-in animation triggered by intersection observer.
frontend/src/components/home/BestSellers: Displays up to 4 bestseller products in a responsive grid with loading skeletons, fade-in animation on scroll, and a link to the full products page.
frontend/src/components/home/CTABanner.t: A call-to-action banner section with a scale/fade-in animation on scroll, headline text, and a link button to the products page.
frontend/src/components/home/FloatingYar: Renders a canvas-based animation of softly drifting radial gradient orbs using requestAnimationFrame, used as a decorative overlay on the hero section.
frontend/src/components/home/HeroSection: Full-screen hero section with a parallax scrolling background, floating yarn canvas animation, staggered fade-in text, and a scroll indicator.
frontend/src/components/layout/Footer.ts: Site footer with brand info, social media links (Instagram, Pinterest, email), a newsletter subscription form, and navigation links organized in a 4-column grid.
frontend/src/components/layout/MusicTogg: A play/pause button component that lazily loads background audio and fades volume in/out over a configurable duration.
frontend/src/components/layout/Navbar.ts: Fixed top navigation bar with scroll-aware styling, centered desktop nav links with active underline indicators, cart icon with item count badge, music toggle, and a mobile hamburger menu.
frontend/src/components/layout/Newslette: A newsletter signup form component that validates an email input and submits it via the useSubscribeToNewsletter mutation, showing toast notifications on success or error.
frontend/src/components/LoadingScreen.ts: Full-screen loading overlay displaying an animated yarn ball SVG, the 'knotankey' brand name, and a bouncing dots indicator while the app initializes.
frontend/src/components/product-detail/Q: A numeric quantity selector UI component with increment/decrement buttons, enforcing configurable min/max bounds.
frontend/src/components/ProductCard.tsx: Product card component displaying product image, title, category, INR-formatted price, a quick-add-to-cart button, and a link to the product detail page.
frontend/src/context/CartContext.tsx: Provides a React context for cart state management with localStorage persistence, exposing add, update, remove, and clear operations along with derived itemCount and total values.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Implements Internet Identity authentication via AuthClient, providing a React context and provider with login, clear, and status state for ICP identity management.
frontend/src/hooks/useIntersectionObserv: A hook that uses IntersectionObserver to return a boolean indicating whether a referenced element has entered the viewport, disconnecting after first intersection.
frontend/src/hooks/useProductFilters.ts: A memoized hook that filters and sorts a product list based on category, price range, bestseller flag, and sort order criteria.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Centralizes all React Query hooks for backend interactions including products, orders, custom order requests, and newsletter subscriptions using the ICP actor.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports fonts, defines Tailwind CSS layers, sets a soft luxury cream/beige CSS variable palette, and declares custom keyframe animations.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/AdminPage.tsx: Admin dashboard page with passcode authentication that renders tabs for managing products, orders, custom orders, and return requests. Uses a hardcoded passcode and shows a login form before granting access.
frontend/src/pages/CartPage.tsx: Shopping cart page displaying cart items and an order summary with total price, with navigation to checkout or back to products. Shows an empty state with a shop link when no items are present.
frontend/src/pages/CheckoutPage.tsx: Checkout page with a validated shipping information form that creates an order via a mutation hook and navigates to a thank-you page on success. Includes an order summary sidebar and maps cart items to the backend Order type.
frontend/src/pages/CustomOrderPage.tsx: Custom order request form page allowing users to specify product type, colors, size, budget, description, and an optional inspiration image upload. Submits the request to the backend and shows a success state on completion.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Home page that composes the HeroSection, BestSellersSection, AboutSection, and CTABanner components into a single layout.
frontend/src/pages/ProductDetailPage.tsx: Product detail page that fetches a single product by ID and displays its image, title, price, and category with quantity selection and add-to-cart or buy-now actions. Shows loading skeletons and a not-found state as appropriate.
frontend/src/pages/ProductsPage.tsx: Displays a filterable, sortable product listing page with category, price, and bestseller filters, using skeleton loading and a responsive grid of ProductCard components.
frontend/src/pages/ReturnsPage.tsx: Renders the Returns & Exchanges page with a return policy section and a validated form that submits return requests via the useCreateReturnRequest mutation hook.
frontend/src/pages/ThankYouPage.tsx: Order confirmation page shown after checkout, displaying the order ID, a secure payment-via-email notice block, next-steps info, and navigation links back to home or products.
frontend/src/utils/currency.ts: Exports a single formatINR utility function that formats a number as Indian Rupees using Intl.NumberFormat with Indian comma notation.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining the brand's custom color palette (cream, warm-brown/tan/sand), typography fonts, box shadows, border radii, and animation keyframes for the knotankey luxury aesthetic.
project_state.json: Project state metadata for the knotankey e-commerce app, tracking existing features and pending feature requests related to adding 'Payment via Email' messaging on the checkout and thank-you pages.
